reasoning: I will distill the article to the single most important development: Labour's plan to abolish tuition fees in England, reintroduce maintenance grants, funded by tax changes and direct government funding of universities, signaling a major shift away from market-based funding.
output: Labour, led by Jeremy Corbyn, pledges to abolish university tuition fees in England and reintroduce maintenance grants, funded by £48.6bn in tax changes and a shift to direct government funding of universities.
